fm-stepper.name: FM Stepper
fm-stepper.description: Step indicator for multi-step wizard flows. Place in a horizontal row — one instance per step. Active = current step, Complete = done, Upcoming = not yet reached.

fm-app-header.name: FM App_header
fm-app-header.description: Top-level application header bar. Contains the Actian logo, product label, and user avatar. Use at the top of every screen mockup.

fm-alert.name: FM Alert
fm-alert.description: Inline feedback message for success, error, or warning states. Use for persistent status messages — for brief confirmations, use FM Toast instead.

fm-dropdown.name: FM Dropdown
fm-dropdown.description: Single-select dropdown. Placeholder = empty, Filled = value selected, Open = showing options, Disabled = non-interactive.

fm-table-cell.name: FM Table Cell
fm-table-cell.description: Table cell for data tables. Header = column title, Text = data value, Pill = status badge, Placeholder = future column.

fm-empty-state.name: FM Empty State
fm-empty-state.description: Empty or zero-data state placeholder. Default = centered with icon and text. Compact = smaller, for inline use. Include onboarding hint text to guide the user.

fm-tab.name: FM Tab
fm-tab.description: Tab for switching between views within the same context. On = active tab, Off = inactive, Placeholder = future/reserved tab slot.

fm-toggle.name: FM Toggle
fm-toggle.description: On/off toggle switch. Use for immediate binary actions. Pair with a text label using fm-custom-toggle-row layout. Disabled style reduces opacity.

fm-page-header.name: FM Page Header
fm-page-header.description: Page title area with optional subtitle and action buttons.
